description: Create a collection named 'Dissertation Notes' containing two standalone notes. Note 1 must include the phrase 'Research Questions', the keywords 'transformer', 'attention', and 'scalability', and be at least 100 characters long. Note 2 must include the phrase 'Key Findings', the keywords 'pre-training', 'fine-tuning', and 'benchmark', and be at least 100 characters long.
